rulings.Case Title: FRANCES SUSSNA VS. PRIME OLD COUNTY LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Striking And Sealing Improperly Filed Confidential Information Protected By The Mediation Privilege; And Enjoining Any Further Use Or Disclosure Of Confidential Information
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 25, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF FRANCES SUSSNA's Motion For Order Striking And Sealing Improperly Filed Confidential Information Protected By The Mediation Privilege; And Enjoining Any Further Use Or Disclosure Of Confidential Information DENIED. Moving party fails to meet the burden under CRC 2.550 and CCP 128. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VICTOR TUNG VS. AMI QI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication On Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 25, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT AMI QI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication On Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint Defendant's Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Defendant failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). ("¿ the specific cause of action, affirmative defense, claims for damages, or issues of duty must be stated specifically in the notice of motion and be repeated, verbatim, in the separate statement of undisputed material facts"). Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Defendant failed to shift it burden, or on the alternative there is a triable issue of fact re: waiver. Fact 7. Defendant relies on evidence that has not been provided to the Court, specifically Ex. H to McIntosh Declaration does not support the purported material Fact 7. Additionally, there is a triable issue of fact as to Facts 8 and 11. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ROUPPET VS. FERGUS O'SULLIVAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend The First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 25, 2016, line 5. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL ROUPPET's Motion For Leave To Amend The First Amended Complaint GRANTED to add a cause of action for breach of contract and to delete a cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress. Hearing Required to address Statute of Limitations re CC 789.3 and whether this statute provides for mandatory or discretionary penalty. = (501/REQ)
